mapper.insert: insert into zh_mrtb( fbrq,tbrq, create_by,qs, comment3, totalnum, Num01, Num02, Num03, Num04, Num05, Num06, Num08, Num11, Num99, gq03, gq02, gq01, jy03, jy02, jy01, xh03, xh02, xh01, zx03, zx02, zx01, xs03, xs02, xs01, nsq03, nsq02, nsq01, sjy03, sjy02, sjy01, ys03, ys02, ys01, gd03, gd02, gd01, fx03, fx02, fx01, hss03, hss02, hss01, ym03, ym02, ym01, jw03, jw02, jw01, gz03, gz02, gz01, ch03, ch02, ch01, hs03, hs02, hs01, jd03, jd02, jd01, xsjq01, xsjq02, xsjq03, xsjq04, xsjq05, xsjq06, xsjq07, xsjq08, xsjq09, xsjq99 ) values( #{fbrq}, #{tbrq}, #{createBy}, #{qs},#{comment3}, #{totalnum}, #{num01}, #{num02}, #{num03}, #{num04}, #{num05}, #{num06}, #{num08}, #{num11}, #{num99}, #{gq03}, #{gq02}, #{gq01}, #{jy03}, #{jy02}, #{jy01}, #{xh03}, #{xh02}, #{xh01}, #{zx03}, #{zx02}, #{zx01}, #{xs03}, #{xs02}, #{xs01}, #{nsq03}, #{nsq02}, #{nsq01}, #{sjy03}, #{sjy02}, #{sjy01}, #{ys03}, #{ys02}, #{ys01}, #{gd03}, #{gd02}, #{gd01}, #{fx03}, #{fx02}, #{fx01}, #{hss03}, #{hss02}, #{hss01}, #{ym03}, #{ym02}, #{ym01}, #{jw03}, #{jw02}, #{jw01}, #{gz03}, #{gz02}, #{gz01}, #{ch03}, #{ch02}, #{ch01}, #{hs03}, #{hs02}, #{hs01}, #{jd03}, #{jd02}, #{jd01}, #{xsjq01}, #{xsjq02}, #{xsjq03}, #{xsjq04}, #{xsjq05}, #{xsjq06}, #{xsjq07}, #{xsjq08}, #{xsjq09}, #{xsjq99} )
